Title: Area Light
Description: This slick and modern luminaire has been designed to handle any environment. this versatile fixture can be used as a flood light or an area light. Including a multitude of mounting options, surge protection devices，Daylight/Motion sensor capability, and the most technologically advanced LED’s on the mark.
Features: UV resistant polycarbonate optical lens with high impact capability---IK09.
Fast and easy installation by 1 person.
Multiple Installation Accessories for choice---Slip-Fitter / Adjustable Arm / Fixed arm / Trunnion / Yoke / Slip-Fitter long arm / Fixed adapter arm.
Excellent heat dissipation management ensures long life-span, with very low driver Tc point.
Great air-pressure management for avoiding distortion of the lens and water-proof failure over time.

Title: Traditional Wall Pack
Description: LED WALL PACK Outdoor LED Semi-Cutoff Wall Pack with photocell, 0-10V Dimming and IP65 rating (Dust proof and waterproof) which sealed by silicone ring so waterproof and dust-proof completely can be ensured. Includes level indicator inside to ensure proper alignment when installed.
Features: Two different mold size to ensure fixture to be cost-effective. Small size & Medium size.
Outdoor special optical tempered glass lens.
Wire Guard and Sky Shield available.
CCT selectable + Power selectable version available.

Title: Mini Wall Pack
Description: Lamily's mini wall lights use the latest high-performance LED chips, which are high-brightness and low-energy consumption. The daylight sensor makes it to be higher energy-efficient. The fixture is composed of a die-cast. Aluminum ADC12 shell and a transparent lens, which waterproof can be ensure . A wide range of applications include stairwells, passageways and entryways in commercial and residential settings.
Features: Automated Dusk to Dawn photocell functionality.
ADC12 Aluminum Die Casting housing provides excellent heat dissipation.

Title: Full Cutoff Wall Pack
Description: LED Full Cutoff Wall Pack Smooth curved design, clean and stylish appearance. Cloudy friendly. Die-cast aluminum housing and polycarbonate lens can work well in the extreme weather. Suitable for outdoor indoor lighting. Widely used in villa, house, shopping mall, building, factories, warehouse, garage etc.
Features: Smooth, clean and stylish appearance. UV resistant lens and coating.
Light 100% face down. Dark sky friendly. Suitable for wet location.
Built-in Microwave sensor and emergency back-up driver available.
Built-in DC12V or External AC120V photocell, level indicator for optional.

Title: Garage Canopy
Features: Perfect LED canopy lights to replace HID fixtures.
Rugged die cast aluminum housing for long last time using.

Title: Gas Station Canopy
Description: Lamily's LED canopy lights are versatile and energy saving fixtures, which are ideal for parking garages, entryways, gas stations, outdoor aisles and many other commercial applications. It comes with color and wattage selectable, allowing you to customize the LED light output to best fit your project. Energy and maintenance savings up to 86% versus HID solutions, and can be easily surface mounted.
Features: Perfect LED canopy lights to replace HID fixtures.
Rugged die cast aluminum housing provides excellent heat dissipation.

Title: Flood Light
Description: LED Flood Light Replace traditional Metal Halide Flood Lights and save big with our energy efficient LED Flood Lights. Global™ LED Flood Lights are perfect for landscape, signage, and accent lighting in heavy commercial and residential applications. Chip-On-Board LEDs are coupled directly to the housing and provide a service life of over 50,000 hours.
Features: Corrosion resistant die cast aluminum housing.
On/off photocell comes standard on all models.
Available with black, bronze, white finish color.

Title: Flood Light
Description: LED Flood Light Replace traditional Metal Halide Flood Lights and save big with our energy efficient LED Flood Lights. Global™ LED Flood Lights are perfect for landscape, signage, and accent lighting in heavy commercial and residential applications. Chip-On-Board LEDs are coupled directly to the housing and provide a service life of over 50,000 hours.
Features: Corrosion resistant die cast aluminum housing.

Title: Frame Light
Description: LED Frame Light Brighten your space with the sleek, modern aesthetic of the LED T-Bar Grid Ceiling Panel Light. Perfectly sized at a compact 2x2, this ceiling light fixture offers superior illumination and complements any décor with its minimalist design. Select from various wattages for your desired lumen output and adjust the ambiance with 5 color temperature options. It is designed for recessed mounting with T-bar installation, making it suitable for various ceiling configurations. Plus, it features 0-10V dimming capabilities. With its cutting-edge optical tech, this energy-efficient 2x4 LED flat panel replaces traditional lighting options.
Features: The Frame light is mainly used in commercial lighting places, such as office, supermarket and so on.
The Frame light has uniform and soft luminance, high luminous efficacy, saving energy and protecting environment.
Using high quality material, with great heat dissipation and low light degradation.
Using high quality driver, efficiency>90%, PF>0.9.
Dustproof: Zero distance between back cover and the frame protect against dust perfectly.
No yellowing problem of Light Guided Plate for this Frame light.

Title: Backlit Panel
Description: PL Series LED panel come with multiple CCT and multiple lumens output, which allows us to choose the most suitable solutions to your projects in one fixture. Back-lit design is without LGP, no risk for yellowing. PMMA lens offers an uniform light effect, also could add additional function such as motion sensor and Emergency battery drivers.
Features: Uniform light effect with optic PMMA lens.

Title: Troffer Light
Description: 2x2 LED TROFFER The 6G Series LED Troffer housing is adopted one-piece production process, offers neat appearance and ultra-thin structure. It makes the fixture much more loaded in containers and cost-down freight. Also be available in multiple configurations of Color Temperatures and Wattages switchable. Ideal for office, retail, healthcare, school hospital etc.
Features: Smooth and comfortable light, low glare.
High quality isolated driver; High efficiency>87%,PF>0.9.
Mainly used in commercial lighting places, such as office, factory and supermarket.
Slim profile ensures much lower shipping and storage cost.
Very unique design for making it stand out easily, compared with regular troffers in the market.

Title: Ceiling Light
Description: （24W,5CCT) Ceiling Light This SMD Series Round 12" 24W 3CCT surface mount downlight features a sleek, ultra-thin design with a smooth white finish, making it an ideal choice for various settings. The fixture's CCT can be adjusted in the field, offering versatile lighting solutions for different environments.
Features: Easy installation directly to most round or octagon junction boxes.
High color rendering index (CRI>80) for accurate color representation.
Long lifespan with lumen maintenance over 70% after 50,000+ hours.
Energy-efficient with a wide 120° beam angle.
ETL and Energy Star certifications for safety and performance.

Title: Slim Down Light
Description: CCT Switch Back lighting LED Panel Ligh can choose between 3000K-6500K color temperature values of 3000K/3500K/4000K/5000K/6500K, which is convenient for consumers to choose the color temperature value they like. The product has high luminous efficiency, lighter weight, long life, environmental protection and no pollution. This is our private mode product whose frame, electric wire and driver box are all developed by our company. We have TRIAC dimmable driver that is compatible with LEVITON and Lutron dimmer .

Title: Recessed Down Light
Description: The damp rated and dimmable Recessed LED Baffle 3/4" Downlight with a bright 800 lumens adjusts to fit 3" or 4" cans. Easily convert the included mounting bracket with a screwdriver. Use the included TP24 connector or E26 adapter base, depending on what your existing can accepts. Uniformed, baffled grooves minimize glare. Consuming only 10W, this light is equivalent to a 60W bulb.

Title: Retrofit Down Ligjt
Description: The damp rated and dimmable Recessed LED Baffle 5/6" Downlight with a bright 965 lumens adjusts to fit 5" or 6" cans. Easily convert the included mounting bracket with a screwdriver. Use the included TP24 connector or E26 adapter base, depending on what your existing can accepts. Uniformed, baffled grooves minimize glare. Consuming only 13W, this light is equivalent to a 75W bulb.

Title: UFO High Bay
Description:
Unique design of reflector (85° or 110° are optional) will provide a warm glow to
your ceiling while illuminating your products to the best possible advantage.
Reliable, easy to install and energy efficient. ALI dimmable LED High Bays are
the perfect solution for your showroom, warehouse, retail, manufacturing
facilities and gymnasiums.
Features: DLC 5.1 Premium with high luminous efficiency and low UGR.
Mounting options: hook/chain, pole pendent and surface mounting.
Round EM driver for fast installation.
CCT & Power selectable version for option.

Title: Linear High Bay
Description: New design 5th Gen LED Linear High Bay fixtures are the first choice for lighting of exhibition hall, warehouses, indoor gymnasium, work areas, storefronts, shopping mall and so on. This Linear High Bay have great heat dissipation function.
Features: ULus & FCC listed; With LM79 & LM80.
High quality non-isolated driver; 1-10V dimming; Flicker free.
Designed for warehouses, gymnasiums, and industrial spaces.

Title: Linear Strip
Description:
Our 5th Gen LED Strip offers "Press-to-Release" button design on the fixture, provide an easy and tool-free way to open fixture for wiring and installing. Designed for long lifespan. it is not only available in multiple configurations and lengths, but also suitable for suspension or surface mounting, continuous linking. Ideal for walkways, indoor storage facilities, office, fitness center, warehouse etc. Features
0-10v dimming, universal voltage: 120-277v.
Available with suspending installation and surface-mounted installation.
Wide application for: school, hospital, supermarket, office and warehouse.
4ft and 8ft dimensions for variety choices.
DLC Listed ACCESSORIES
Features: Available with suspending installation and surface-mounted installation.
Wide application for: school, hospital, supermarket, office and warehouse.

Title: Up and down linear slot light
Description: Introducing our 4ft Up & Down LED Linear Light, the ultimate lighting solution designed to enhance your space. This innovative lighting fixture offers unparalleled versatility, including dimmability and color tunability, making it a perfect choice for various lighting applications. With its adaptability and customizable features, this LED linear light is perfect for a wide range of lighting needs. Whether you need to brighten up a living space, office, retail store, or any other area, this lighting fixture's versatility makes it a top choice for various lighting applications.
Category: Up and down linear slot light
Features: Color temperature tunable for adjustable lighting.
Energy-efficient design for reduced power consumption.
Versatile and adaptable for various lighting needs.

Title: Vapor Tight
Description: These fixtures have a durable housing that resists warping, fading, corrosion, and rust. The impact resistant lenses are able to withstand the weather, and are held in place by non-corrosive metal clips. LED vapor tight fixtures use half the energy of fluorescents, lowering energy cost. These fixtures also eliminate lamp replacement costs and compatibility issues by using integrated LEDs. Energy Star or DLC certified fixtures may qualify for state or local rebates for additional savings.
Features: Construction: Traditional design, narrow body, Vapor Tight fixture, suitable for rugged, demanding applications.
IP rating: Ingress Protection rating of IP65 for dust and water.
Mounting: Surface mounted and cable suspended available.
LEDs: LED system with a life rating of ≥50,000 hours at L70 @25°C. Luminaire efficacy >140lm/W.
Lens: UV-stabilized, injection-molded, impact-resistant polycarbonate lens.

Title: Tube Series
Variant: Type B Wattage and Color Tunable
Description: Super bright LED tube light is with 96pcs SMD2835, which has higher lumen efficiency and perfect lighting performance. With flicker free driver, instant start, no radiation, no noise, no mercury and other material that is harmful to human body and environment. Also with 5 different color temperatures, you're sure to find the lighting color to best match your room. This tube operates on single-ended or double-ended power which allows for flexible installation in either shunted or non-shunted sockets.

Title: Tube Series
Description: Super bright LED tube light with double LED chips built in, which has higher lumen efficiency and perfect lighting performance. With flicker free driver, instant start, no radiation, no noise, no mercury and other material that is harmful to human body and environment. This tube operates on single-ended or double-ended power which allows for flexible installation in either shunted or non-shunted sockets.

Description: Super bright LED tube light is with 96pcs SMD2835, which has higher lumen efficiency and perfect lighting performance. Title: Tube Series
Description: Super bright LED tube light with 336pcs or 576pcs high quality LED chips, which has higher lumen efficiency and perfect lighting performance. With flicker free driver, instant start, no radiation, no noise, no mercury and other material that is harmful to human body and environment.

Title: Tube Series
Description: Instant on, Non- dimmable; Dual-end powered. R17D HO base. Ballast bypass installation required. Bright, high output LED. 50,000+ hour lifetime. Durable, shatterproof construction. No UV or IR radiation. Does not contain mercury. With flicker free driver, instant start, noise free, other material that is harmful to human body and environment.
Features: R17D HO base with 180 degrees rotatable.

Title: Integrated TubeV shape Integrated
Description: Transform your indoor spaces with ALI LED Lighting's cutting-edge T8 LED shop lights. This high-output LED integrated light linkable fixture is engineered for exceptional indoor illumination. Ideal for retail shops, warehouses, offices, and garages. The crystal white 6500K color temperature creates a well-lit and vibrant environment, ensuring optimal visibility and productivity.

Title: Integrated Tube
Description: Integrated Tube（LED Moisture Proof Tube （IP55）） LED Moisture Proof Tube （IP55） ALI LED integrated moisture proof Tubes work without a ballast and our self-sufficient fixtures which can be mounted on any flat surface. Simply plug in the 3 prong plug to the fixture and wire the fixture directly to AC 100-277; mount the fixture with the standard clips included, and the fixture will illuminate with ease. The crystal white 6500K color temperature creates a well-lit and vibrant environment, ensuring optimal visibility and productivity.

Title: Integrated TubeFlat Integrated Tube
Description: ALI LED integrated moisture proof Tubes work without a ballast and our self-sufficient fixtures which can be mounted on any flat surface. Simply plug in the 3 prong plug to the fixture and wire the fixture directly to AC 100-277; mount the fixture with the standard clips included, and the fixture will illuminate with ease.

Title: Bollards Light
Description: Bollards are your first choice for garden lighting projects. 3-in-1 switch is selectable for CCT, wattage, and photocell ON/OFF control. D2D photocell automatically turns off at sunrise and turns on at sunset. Interchangeable bollard heads reduce SKUs and save volume while meeting different project demands.
Features: Interchangeable heads reduce SKUs and volume
